[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101010001 4
1 1101001000 4
2 1110000000 3
3 0100000000 1
4 0101110000 4
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

12 21 1101000000 3
23 32 0111000000 3

67 76 0100000000 1 match 3
70 07 0101110000 4 match 4

71 17 0101100000 3
